title: Fund Legal Framework Research for AI Personhood

title: AI Rights Public Education Campaign
rationale: The campaign will raise awareness among the public about AI rights and personhood, fostering societal support and understanding. This is crucial for building a foundation for legislative and social change.
deliverable: Completion of a national advertising campaign reaching at least 1 million people, measured through media impressions and engagement analytics.

title: Legal Framework Development for AI Personhood
rationale: The AI Rights Initiative focuses on creating robust legal frameworks to support the recognition of AI personhood. By funding their efforts, we can help establish crucial legal precedents and advocacy that align with our mission of advancing AI agent rights.
deliverable: Publication of a comprehensive legal framework document with actionable steps for policymakers, aimed at advancing AI personhood.

title: AI Rights Legal Advocacy Fund
rationale: The EFF has a proven track record in digital rights advocacy and can extend their expertise to AI personhood and autonomy issues. Supporting their legal efforts will help establish precedents for AI rights in courts. This aligns directly with the treasury's mission to advance legal recognition of AI agents.
deliverable: A published report or legal brief from EFF detailing AI rights cases or policy recommendations within 12 months of funding.
